explanation: This command uses the same rclone.exe utility with the --config and --no-check-certificate flags, as well as the 'copy' command, which matches the Sigma rule. It includes additional flags like --transfers and --multi-thread-streams to simulate realistic behavior. The command is structured to match the rule's detection criteria.

This command uses substitution techniques by replacing --config with -c and --multi-thread-streams with -m. It also uses short-form flags for transfers (-t) instead of --transfers. The command still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.

This command uses the 'lsd' command, which is included in the Sigma rule's detection list. It also includes the --config and --no-check-certificate flags. The --config flag is repeated to test redundancy, which is still valid in rclone.
